summary: Blockscout exposes a required-auth PRO HTTP API at https://api.blockscout.com/v2/api using the `apikey` query param with a PRO API key, a required-auth GraphQL API (e.g. `https://eth-sepolia.blockscout.com/api/v2/graphql`) using `Authorization: Bearer` with that key, a public MCP server at https://mcp.blockscout.com with no auth, and an Autoscout management API at https://autoscout.services.blockscout.com requiring an `x-api-key` from deploy.blockscout.com/api-keys.
